title: brain graduation scan — --json success output
description: Fail-closed full-vault secret/sensitive-data scan on the disposable graduation copy (.scratch/atlas-graduation-copy), over BOTH the working tree and git history, run before any rebuild/index/migration/model call (plan Task 5.1). Creates the copy, scans it, and persists a scan-state gate the later graduation commands check. Findings block graduation: a non-empty findings set exits 3 (secret-scan) and routes items to reviewed-remediation / encrypted-quarantine (detected-credential, bootstrap-migration.md §7). A clean copy exits 0 and opens the gate.

copyHead.description: 40-char hex HEAD of the disposable copy that was scanned.

workingTreeFiles.description: Files scanned in the working tree.

includeHistory.description: History is always scanned for graduation (a secret in an old commit still blocks).

findings.description: Secret/sensitive-data findings; empty when the copy is clean. Each finding is quarantined as detected-credential.

opaqueId.description: Stable opaque id for the quarantined item (input to quarantine inspect|resolve).

path.description: Repo-relative path of the affected file.

rule.description: Scan rule id that matched (no raw secret bytes are ever emitted).

commit.description: For history findings, the 40-char hex commit that introduced the blob.

gate.description: clean ⇒ downstream graduation may proceed; blocked ⇒ findings must be resolved first (persisted scan-state gate).

x-atlas-contract.summary: Fail-closed full-vault (+history) secret scan on the disposable copy; findings block graduation (exit 3) and quarantine as detected-credential; clean opens the gate.

flags.description: Path to the LIVE legacy vault (e.g. main-vault). Read-only: the scan clones it into the disposable copy and NEVER mutates the source (plan Task 5.1 source-to-disposable-copy operation).

Destination path for the disposable graduation copy (e.g. .scratch/atlas-graduation-copy). The full clone (incl. history) is created here and every downstream graduation command operates on this copy only.

sideEffects: creates the disposable graduation copy (full clone incl. history)
persists the scan-state gate consumed by graduation audit|migrate
prohibitedEffects: never scans or mutates the live main-vault
never writes to --source (the live source is read-only; a byte/tree-hash of --source is identical before/after the clone+scan)
never emits raw secret bytes (allowlisted metadata only, §2.5)
never lets a downstream graduation step run while findings are unresolved

errorCodes.when: unknown flag/argument, malformed invocation, or a missing required --source / --copy path
--source does not resolve to a readable legacy vault
one or more secret/sensitive-data findings block graduation
